meaning: n.包办伙食者,(尤)指备办宴会者
examples: Caterer: Sure, you can. A table of four, too?
Krayeski called Jack Jacobs, a caterer who lives in Delray Beach.
Jane asked the caterer for a menu along the lines of the Morgans' wedding reception.
All we would have to do is call a caterer and a party equipment rental facility.
To garner a spot on a worldwide tour, a caterer will generally have a lot of experience.
